247.description: Keep me in the voice channel 24/7! I'll always be ready to play 🎵

errors.not_in_voice: Hey! Jump into a voice channel first so I know where to stay 🎵
errors.generic: Oops! Something went wrong. Try again? 🔧

messages.disabled: 24/7 mode is off! I'll leave when inactive now 👋
messages.enabled: 24/7 mode is on! I'll stay here all day, every day 🎶

fairplay.description: Fair play mode! Everyone gets an equal share of songs in the queue 🎲

errors.not_in_voice: Join a voice channel first! I need to know where the fairness happens 🎵
errors.generic: Oops! Hit a snag. Mind trying that again? 🔧

messages.disabled: Fair play is off! Queue however you like now 🎵
messages.enabled: Fair play is on! Everyone gets equal song slots in the queue 🎲

ping.description: Check my connection speed! See how fast I respond ⚡

lavalink.description: Peek at my audio engine's performance! See how I'm running 📊
lavalink.title: Lavalink Stats

invite.description: Invite me to your server! Share the music love 💖
invite.content: Want me in your server? Click the button below! Need help or found a bug? Come hang out in the support server! 🎉

help.description: Need help? I've got you covered! See all my commands 📚

options.command: The command you want to learn about

help.content: Hey there! I'm {bot}, your music companion 🎵 Built with love using [MultiBungoBot](https://github.com/ductridev/multi-distube-bots) and Discord.js. Use `{prefix}help <command>` to learn more about any command!
help.title: Help Menu
help.not_found: Hmm, I don't recognize the `{cmdName}` command. Check your spelling? 🤔
help.footer: Use {prefix}help <command> for detailed info • BuNgo Music Bot 🎵 • Made by Gúp Bu Ngô with ❤️

botinfo.description: Get to know me better! Check my stats and info 🤖

about.description: Learn about my story! Who made me and why 💡

fields.creator: Creator
fields.description: This is a passion project - my creator's first open source adventure! Built to bring music to Discord servers with fewer bugs and more love. Hope you enjoy jamming with MultiBungoBot! 🎵

dj.description: Manage DJ roles! Control who can command the music 🎧

errors.provide_role: Which role? Mention the role you want to set as DJ!
errors.no_roles: No DJ roles set up yet! Everyone can control music 🎵
errors.invalid_subcommand: That's not a valid option! Try add, remove, clear, or toggle.

messages.role_exists: <@&{roleId}> is already a DJ role! They're all set 🎧
messages.role_added: <@&{roleId}> is now a DJ role! They can control the music now 🎵
messages.role_not_found: <@&{roleId}> isn't a DJ role. Can't remove what isn't there! 🤷
messages.role_removed: <@&{roleId}> is no longer a DJ role. Back to regular listening! 🎵
messages.all_roles_cleared: All DJ roles removed! Everyone can control music again 🎶

vote.description: Manage voting for music commands! Democracy in action 🗳️

errors.invalid_subcommand: That option doesn't exist! Use toggle or status.

language.description: Choose your language! I can speak many languages 🌍
language.invalid_language:
Hmm, that's not a valid language. Try one from the list! Example: `EnglishUS` for English (United States)

Find all supported languages [here](https://discord.com/developers/docs/reference#locales)

**Available Languages:**
{languages}
language.not_set: No language set yet! Using the default.
language.reset: Language reset to default! Back to basics 🔄

options.language: The language you want to use

prefix.description: Check or change my command prefix! Make it yours 🎮

errors.prefix_too_long: Keep it short! Prefix can't be longer than 3 characters.

messages.prefix_set: Prefix changed to `{prefix}`! Use it to command me ✨
messages.prefix_reset: Prefix reset to `{prefix}`! Back to default 🔄

setup.description: Set up a dedicated music request channel! Super convenient 🎵

errors.channel_exists: You already have a song request channel! Check it out 🎶
errors.channel_not_exists: No song request channel found! Create one first.
errors.channel_delete_fail: Removed from my database, but please delete the channel manually! 🛠️

messages.channel_created: Song request channel created in <#{channelId}>! Start queuing music there 🎵
messages.channel_deleted: Song request channel deleted! Gone but not forgotten 👋

8d.description: Toggle 8D audio effect! Feel the music move around you 🔊

messages.filter_enabled: 8D filter is on! Put on headphones for the best experience 🎧
messages.filter_disabled: 8D filter is off! Back to stereo sound 🔊

bassboost.description: Boost that bass! Make it thump 🔊

options.level: Bass level (low, medium, high, or off)

messages.high: High bass boost activated! Feel the rumble 🔊
messages.low: Low bass boost activated! Just a little extra thump 🎵
messages.medium: Medium bass boost activated! Nice and balanced 🎶
messages.off: Bass boost off! Natural sound restored ✨

distortion.description: Toggle distortion effect! Rock out with attitude 🎸

messages.filter_disabled: Distortion is off! Clean sound restored ✨

karaoke.description: Toggle karaoke mode! Remove vocals and sing along 🎤

messages.filter_enabled: Karaoke mode on! Time to sing 🎤
messages.filter_disabled: Karaoke mode off! Vocals are back 🎵

lowpass.description: Toggle lowpass filter! Mellow out the highs 🎶

messages.filter_enabled: Lowpass filter on! Smooth and mellow vibes 🌊
messages.filter_disabled: Lowpass filter off! Full frequency restored ✨

nightcore.description: Toggle nightcore effect! Fast and high-pitched ⚡

messages.filter_enabled: Nightcore mode on! Sped up and high-pitched ⚡
messages.filter_disabled: Nightcore mode off! Normal speed restored 🎵

pitch.description: Adjust the pitch! Make it higher or lower 🎹

options.pitch: Pitch level (0.5 to 5, where 1 is normal)

errors.invalid_number: Please use a number between 0.5 and 5! Try 1.2 for slightly higher pitch 🎵

messages.pitch_set: Pitch adjusted to **{pitch}**! How does it sound? 🎹

rate.description: Change the playback rate! Speed it up or slow it down ⏱️

options.rate: Playback rate (0.5 to 5, where 1 is normal)

errors.invalid_number: Please use a number between 0.5 and 5! Try 1.5 for faster playback ⚡

messages.rate_set: Playback rate set to **{rate}**! Enjoy the tempo 🎶

reset.description: Reset all audio filters! Back to the original sound 🔄

messages.filters_reset: All filters reset! Clean, original sound restored ✨

rotation.description: Toggle rotation effect! Make the sound spin around 🌀

messages.enabled: Rotation effect on! Feel the music spin 🌀
messages.disabled: Rotation effect off! Static sound restored ✨

speed.description: Adjust playback speed! Fast forward or slow mo ⚡

messages.invalid_number: Use a number between 0.5 and 5! Try 1.25 for a slight boost ⚡

tremolo.description: Toggle tremolo effect! Add a wavering sound 🌊

messages.enabled: Tremolo effect on! Feel the waves 🌊
messages.disabled: Tremolo effect off! Steady sound restored ✨

vibrato.description: Toggle vibrato effect! Add a subtle wobble 🎶

messages.disabled: Vibrato effect off! Stable sound restored ✨

autoplay.description: Toggle autoplay! Keep the music flowing automatically 🔁

messages.enabled: Autoplay is on! I'll keep finding similar tracks when the queue ends 🎵
messages.disabled: Autoplay is off! Music stops when the queue ends ⏹️

LIVE_LYRICS.NO_PLAYER: There is no music playing right now.
LIVE_LYRICS.NO_LYRICS: No synced lyrics found for this track.
LIVE_LYRICS.TITLE: 🎤 Live Lyrics - {track}
LIVE_LYRICS.ERROR: An error occurred while fetching lyrics.
LIVE_LYRICS.PAUSED: Playback paused. Lyrics will resume when playback continues.
LIVE_LYRICS.NO_SYNCED_DESCRIPTION:
Could not find synchronized lyrics for **{trackTitle}**.

**Alternatives:**
• Use `/lyrics` for static lyrics
• Try a different track

Synced lyrics work best with popular songs from Spotify, Deezer, or YouTube Music.
LIVE_LYRICS.ALREADY_RUNNING: Live lyrics is already running! Use the Stop button to end it first.
LIVE_LYRICS.STARTED: 🎤 Live lyrics started! Check the message below.

Leave a guild: Make the bot leave a server 🚪
Show current maintenance status: Check if bot is under maintenance 🛠️
View current LavaSrc configuration for a: View current LavaSrc configuration for a node
Manage YouTube source configuration at r: Manage YouTube source configuration at runtime
Refresh an OAuth token using a refresh t: Refresh an OAuth token using a refresh token
Skip OAuth initialization flow (recommen: Skip OAuth initialization flow (recommended when providing token)
Proof of Origin token (generate with you: Proof of Origin token (generate with youtube-trusted-session-generator)
Visitor data associated with the poToken: Visitor data associated with the poToken
